default GetPar == NumCPU: true
WithPar(8): 8
WithParUnbounded sentinel: true
WithPar(0) falls back: true
WithPar(-5) falls back: true

ParMap empty: []
ParMap WithPar(3) cap honoured: true

q.TryE(ParMapErr).Wrap fail: parsing: strconv.Atoi: parsing "y": invalid syntax
ParMapErr cancel: true
ParFlatMap: [1 10 2 20 3 30]
ParFlatMapErr fail: flat-fail
ParFilter: [2 4 6]
ParFilterErr ok: [1 3]
ParFilterErr fail: true
ParForEach sum: 15
ParForEachErr err: boom
ParForEachErr seen-before-err: [1 2]
ParForEachErr cancel: true
ForEach sum: 15
ForEachErr fail: true
ParExists yes: true

ParExistsErr fail: true
